title: Dimension Cows
body:
Embark on a bovine adventure like never before with the "Dimension Cows" Minecraft mod! Say farewell to the plain, ordinary cows and welcome a diverse herd that adapts to the unique environments of Minecraft's vast dimensions.

Unleash the charm of dimension-specific cows as they roam across the landscape, each with its distinct appearance and special attributes. Whether you're exploring the dense fungai forests, or exploring the deep end, you'll encounter cows perfectly adapted to their surroundings.
Each biome cow drops its specific plant type. With Chorus cows dropping Chorus fruit, and Crimson cows dropping Crimson logs.


Connect to my discord for updates and bug reports:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/GSqPUHZK4n)
